title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, trying to sell ebooks, courses, or software, you're likely frustrated with the fact that PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip exclude your countries due to strict regulations and geographical restrictions. You've probably asked yourself, 'What are my options for selling digital products without being limited by conventional payment processors?' This post will give you a clear comparison of the best alternatives for restricted countries, helping you make an informed decision and start selling your digital products without any hassle.
What Each Option Actually Offers

The truth is, most alternatives to Payhip for restricted countries are limited in their features and capabilities. Gumroad, for example, has a long list of blocked countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, while Stripe has strict requirements for merchants in these countries, making it difficult for many creators to use their services. Payhip itself has a limited set of features, unable to handle complex store management and customization. On the other hand, the Full Stack Bundle, a complete store infrastructure, offers everything you need to start selling digital products, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one payment, for $79.99. With the Full Stack Bundle, you get priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, ensuring you're always up-to-date and successful.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to countries with strict regulations, such as Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, PayPal and Stripe are not your only limited options. In fact, most creators in these countries are left with few alternatives. However, NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor, offers a solution by enabling merchants to accept over 300 cryptocurrencies, without any geographical restrictions or KYC requirements. This means that creators in restricted countries can finally sell their digital products without worrying about being blocked or limited by conventional payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, the alternatives to Payhip for restricted countries often fall short. Gumroad, for instance, charges a flat fee of 3.5% on sales, while Stripe charges a higher fee for merchants in restricted countries. Payhip itself charges a flat fee of 3.9% on sales. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers a one-time payment of $79.99, with no subscription fees or ongoing costs. With the Full Stack Bundle, you can sell your digital products without worrying about additional costs or fees.
Gumroad and Stripe are not your only options for selling digital products in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are crucial for successful digital product sales. The Full Stack Bundle offers automated delivery of digital products, with no manual intervention required. The Core Engine handles complex store management and customization, while the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management. This means that creators can focus on what matters most - creating and marketing their products, rather than worrying about technical details.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is best for you? If you're a creator in a restricted country, the Full Stack Bundle is the clear winner. With its complete store infrastructure, automated delivery capabilities, and one-time payment of $79.99, you can finally sell your digital products without any hassle or limitations. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or software, the Full Stack Bundle has everything you need to succeed.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
PayPal and Stripe are not the only payment processors that exclude restricted countries.
